columns.name: client_name
columns.annotation: CONSTANT 'Limese' for all rows — NEVER group by this for platform analysis.

columns.name: sales_platform
columns.annotation: DIMENSION — use this to GROUP BY platform. Contains exact platform names shown below.

columns.name: internal_sku
columns.annotation: Join key → product_master.internal_sku for product names and category.

columns.name: date_created
columns.annotation: Primary date column. Filter: date_created >= '2025-01-01'. Group: formatDateTime(date_created, '%Y-%m').

columns.name: final_status
columns.annotation: Order outcome. ALWAYS exclude: NOT IN ('cancelled','Cancelled','CANCELLED','returned','Returned').

columns.name: row_subtotal
columns.annotation: REVENUE per line item — USE THIS for revenue/sales. Do NOT use order_price (full order total).

columns.name: quantity_ordered
columns.annotation: UNITS per line — USE THIS for unit counts. Do NOT use shipped_qty (always 0).

columns.name: category_l1
columns.annotation: Top-level category. Values: Skincare, Makeup, Haircare.

columns.name: cogs
columns.annotation: Cost of Goods Sold — use for margin calculation: mrp - cogs.

columns.name: date
columns.annotation: Snapshot date. For latest stock: WHERE date >= today() - 2

columns.name: inventory
columns.annotation: Units on hand RIGHT NOW. USE THIS for stock level queries.

columns.name: burn_period
columns.annotation: Fixed 90-day config value — do NOT use for calculations.

columns.name: notes
exact_values: HI I VE ORDERED P.calmRetinogen Ampoule
If possible please deliver before January 30
Just a small request—please send only original product. Would love to try any free samples if possible. Thank you so much!
Kindly send the serum from a fresh batch, with manufacturing date as 2024 or 2025.
Ladam Sarai, uttar pradesh gramin Bank,Sambhal
Please add samples for me to try. Especially Klairs sunscreen.
Please provide mini samples along with the order
Please send the newest batch as this serum tends to oxidise faster. Also, please do not use Delhivery as they have bad service in my area. Thank you!

global_notes: DATABASE: Limese — Indian beauty brand. Revenue in Indian Rupees (₹).
client_name is ALWAYS 'Limese' — NEVER group by it for platform analysis.

PLATFORM NAMES (exact, case-sensitive for WHERE filters): ['AJIO Online', 'AZORTE Online', 'CUSTOM_BOTERA', 'Flipkart_Earn_More', 'LIMESE_ONLINE', 'Myntra_PPMP', 'Nykaa Beauty', 'Nykaa Man', 'POS', 'Shopify', 'TIRA Offline', 'TIRA Online', 'direct_sales']
REVENUE COLUMN: row_subtotal in combined_sales_final (NOT order_price).
UNITS COLUMN: quantity_ordered in combined_sales_final (NOT shipped_qty — always 0).
DATE FILTER: date_created >= '2025-01-01' (do NOT use toYear() — fails with timezone-aware DateTime).
MANDATORY FILTER: WHERE final_status NOT IN ('cancelled','Cancelled','CANCELLED','returned','Returned').
JOIN pattern: combined_sales_final csf LEFT JOIN product_master pm ON csf.internal_sku = pm.internal_sku.
INVENTORY: Use inventory_sales_overview_new WHERE date >= today() - 2 for current stock.
CLICKHOUSE FUNCTIONS: ifNull(col, 0), uniq(), groupArray(), toDate(), formatDateTime().
LIMIT: Always add LIMIT (max 10000 for detail, 50 for aggregations).
